de.uka.ilkd.key.java

Class CcatchNonstandardParameterDeclaration

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaSourceElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaProgramElement
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
          • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.CcatchNonstandardParameterDeclaration
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ModelElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement, SVSubstitute
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    CcatchBreakLabelParameterDeclaration, CcatchBreakParameterDeclaration, CcatchBreakWildcardParameterDeclaration, CcatchContinueLabelParameterDeclaration, CcatchContinueParameterDeclaration, CcatchContinueWildcardParameterDeclaration, CcatchReturnParameterDeclaration, CcatchReturnValParameterDeclaration

    public abstract class CcatchNonstandardParameterDeclaration
extends JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
    A "non-standard" parameter declaration of a Ccatch clause, e.g., "\Return".
